faqs.question: What does general pest control service include in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service includes a thorough interior and exterior inspection, treatment for common pests like ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish, and mice, application of safe and effective products in key areas, and follow-up support. We customize treatments based on your specific pest issues and property type.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on property size, severity of infestation, and type of treatment required. Smaller apartments or single-room treatments typically start at $175, while larger homes or properties requiring extensive treatment may reach $300. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you service my West Brighton property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most West Brighton locations. Our team understands that pest problems require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response times throughout Staten Island. Call us in the morning, and we'll typically arrive the same afternoon.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family and pets. Our technicians are trained in the latest low-toxicity application methods, and we provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions. Your safety is our top priority in every West Brighton home we service.
